entity.label: Lemuel
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: Dedicated to God, a king whom his mother instructed (Prov. 31:1-9). Nothing is certainly known concerning him. The rabbis identified him with Solomon.

nodes.label: Lemuel
nodes.description: Dedicated to God, a king whom his mother instructed (Prov. 31:1-9). Nothing is certainly known concerning him. The rabbis identified him with Solomon.

verses.text: The words of king Lemuel, the prophecy that his mother taught him.
It is not for kings, O Lemuel, it is not for kings to drink wine; nor for princes strong drink:
